react_icons.reason: Official Python brand icon for backend integration display
Official SQLite brand icon for data source display
Official React brand icon for frontend framework display

downloaded_assets.title: CERN Large Hadron Collider Detector
downloaded_assets.description: High-detail view of the CMS detector at CERN, showing intricate scientific engineering
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Wide-angle shot of a massive circular detector component with thousands of colorful wires (blue, red) and structural beams. Yellow gantry and metal flooring in the foreground. High-tech, industrial, and deeply complex.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant industrial grays, vibrant primary reds and blues from cabling. High contrast. Matches the requested blue theme perfectly.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Intricate detector components inside the CERN Large Hadron Collider
downloaded_assets.license_notes: Free to use via Pexels license
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by Ramaz Bluashvili on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfect visual representation of the app's context - actual CERN accelerator hardware

downloaded_assets.title: CERN Accelerator Machinery
downloaded_assets.description: Alternative view of accelerator infrastructure at CERN
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Medium shot of a conical detector component with gold-foil accents and structural ribs. Industrial setting with green structural beams and fluorescent lighting in the background.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Industrial green, metallic silver, and gold. Cooler lighting than the LHC tunnel photo.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: CERN particle accelerator machinery and detector components
downloaded_assets.license_notes: Free to use via Pexels license
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by Pietro Battistoni on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Good secondary hero option with a more focused subject

downloaded_assets.title: Radiation Controlled Area Sign
downloaded_assets.description: Professional safety signage for an X-ray or radiation controlled laboratory area
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Low-light shot of a doorway with an illuminated 'Controlled Area X-Rays' sign and a 'No Entry' sign. The setting is sterile and professional, typical of a research facility.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dark wood tones, muted whites, and high-visibility yellow/red from safety signs.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Illuminated radiation controlled area warning sign on a lab door
downloaded_assets.license_notes: Free to use via Pexels license
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by Jo McNamara on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Directly matches the 'activation risk' and 'radiation protection' theme of the app

downloaded_assets.title: Technical Blueprint Layout
downloaded_assets.description: High-precision architectural or engineering floor plan
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Clean, high-key shot of a white blueprint with gray technical lines, grid patterns, and dimension callouts. Minimalist and very professional.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Monochromatic light gray and white. Very clean.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Detailed technical blueprint with architectural grid lines
downloaded_assets.license_notes: Free to use via Pexels license
downloaded_assets.attribution: Photo by Ivan S on Pexels
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Excellent subtle background for data-heavy dashboard sections

downloaded_assets.title: CERN Logo
downloaded_assets.description: Official logo of the European Organization for Nuclear Research
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Geometric circular logo with the letters 'CERN' inside, reflecting the accelerator paths.

css_textures.description: Subtle dot grid pattern that evokes a laboratory notebook or technical terminal

usage_notes: The hero-lhc-tunnel photo is the strongest recommendation for the landing page due to its vibrant colors and direct relevance to CERN.
The texture-blueprint-grid should be used with low opacity (0.05-0.1) as a background for dashboard cards.
Use react-icons SiPython, SiSqlite, and SiReact for the technical stack row.
